mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = nil
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  self.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new

  html_body = data["html"]

    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data[].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]

    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part

    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array().join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data.key?("to")).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data.at("subject").to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data.key?("subject").to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data[]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new

  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data.key?("html")
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]

    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body || text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = self.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    nil
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new

  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")

    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part

    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type=""
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

    nil

      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"

    end

  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body

      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    mail.body=html_body
  end
  mail.to_s
end

  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]

    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      "text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

    if html_body

    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body

      mail.body=html_body
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=""
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=self.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    unless html_body
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end
